pillars.title: Sovereign by Code
pillars.summary: Governance encoded in transparent, auditable protocols rather than opaque bureaucracies.

pillars.title: Citizen-First Design
pillars.summary: Every system built for human flourishing, dignity, and verifiable participation.

pillars.title: Open by Default
pillars.summary: Algorithms, ledgers, and decisions public unless charter-classified with sunset review.

pillars.title: Global Interoperability
pillars.summary: Standards alignment with international bodies for eventual recognition and integration.
